title: NiceSet
description: The Great Kagura loves the number $S$. In front of her, she has a sequence of integers $a_1, \dots , a_n$. She wants to select a collection of these integers such that the sum of the absolute values of the differences of all pairs of integers in her collection is at most $S$. For example, if her collection is $x$, $y$, $z$, then $|x − y| + |x − z| + |y − z| ≤ S$. She wants to select the largest collection that she can. Can you help her?
input: The first line of the input contains the two integers $n$ and $S$. The second line of the input contains $a_1, \dots , a_n$.
output: Output the size of the largest collection of integers from among $a_1, \dots , a_n$ that satisfy the required condition.
